cat /etc/init.d/cron:
#!/bin/sh

# Cron daemon

# Source function library.
. /lib/init.d/functions

# See how we were called.
case "$1" in
  start)
    # Start the cron daemon.
    start_daemon crond
    ;;
  stop)
    # Stop the cron daemon.
    stop_daemon crond
    ;;
  restart)
    # Restart the cron daemon.
    stop_daemon crond
    start_daemon crond
    ;;
  reload)
    # If the daemon was started by init, stop it and start it again.
    if [ -f /var/lock/subsys/crond ]; then
      stop_daemon crond
      start_daemon crond
    else
      echo $"Usage: $0 {start|stop|restart|reload}"
      exit 1
    fi
    ;;
  condrestart)
    # Restart if already running.
    if [ -f /var/lock/subsys/crond ]; then
      stop_daemon crond
      start_daemon crond
    fi
    ;;
  status)
    # Check if the cron daemon is running.
    status_of_proc -p /var/run/crond.pid crond cron
    ;;
